---
title: "Decode CSV data for MUSIC"
author: "Michael Corace"
date: "3/9/2022"
output: html_document
---

Libraries
```{r}
library(jsonlite)
library(tidyverse)
install.packages("readxl")
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(jsonlite)
```

First, let's see what we can extract from the provided data dictionary.
```{r}
dd_path <- '~/Documents/pic-sure-metadata-curation/music/input/MUSIC_DataDictionary_2022-07-12.csv'

# read in the csv to a data frame
data_dictionary_df <- read.csv(dd_path)

data_dictionary_df <- data.frame(Variable=data_dictionary_df$Variable...Field.Name, Code=data_dictionary_df$Choices..Calculations..OR.Slider.Labels)
```

Now we read in the csv and decode the data

```{r}
test_data_2022_6_15_df <- read_xlsx("~/Documents/pic-sure-metadata-curation/music/input/MUSIC_DATA_2022-06-15.xlsx")

decoded_df <- test_data_2022_6_15_df

coded_vars_df <- data_dictionary_df[which(data_dictionary_df$Code!=""),]

vars_to_ignore <- c("aefu_meddracd","anc","alc","nl_ratio","fss_total","ae_meddracd")

coded_vars_df <- coded_vars_df[-which(coded_vars_df$Variable%in%vars_to_ignore),]


#code_df <- data.frame(ID = NA, Code = NA, Value = NA)

for (i in c(1:length(coded_vars_df$Variable))) {
  var = coded_vars_df[i,]$Variable
  
  #print(var)
  
  codes_sep <- str_split(coded_vars_df[i,]$Code,"\\|")
  
  #codes_sep <- str_trim(codes_sep)
  
  for(code in codes_sep[[1]]){
    #print(code)
    #if(str_detect(code,",",negate = TRUE)){
    #        print(code)
    #}
    
    trim_code <- str_trim(code)
    
    coded_val = str_trim(str_split(code,",")[[1]][1])
    #print(coded_val)
    
    if(substring(code,1,5)==substring(code,8,12)){
      true_val <- str_trim(substring(code,14))
    }else if(substring(code,1,6)==substring(code,9,14)){
      true_val <- str_trim(substring(code,17))
      #print(coded_val)
      #print(true_val)
    }else{
      true_val = str_trim(str_split(code,",",)[[1]][2])
    }
    
    #print(true_val)
    
    if(var %in% colnames(decoded_df)){
      decoded_df[[var]] <- replace(decoded_df[[var]], which(decoded_df[[var]]==coded_val), true_val)
    }
  }
}


decoded_char_df <- data.frame(lapply(decoded_df, as.character),stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
#decoded_char_df[is.na(decoded_char_df)] <- ""
decoded_char_df %>% mutate_all(funs(str_replace(.,"NA","")))


```

```{r}

write.csv(decoded_char_df, "../output/decoded_data.csv", row.names = F)

```
